entities.name: WHITE FONIO
entities.description: A minor but vital under-domesticated orphan crop of West Africa valued for resilience and nutrition

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The region where white fonio is a vital crop

entities.name: HOT, DRY, AND LOW-FERTILITY ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environmental conditions to which white fonio is resilient

entities.name: HUMAN NUTRITION
entities.description: The purpose for which white fonio grain is valued

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING AND IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing crop characteristics, which has been limited for white fonio

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the complete DNA sequence of the white fonio genome

entities.name: SMRT-CELL TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Long-read sequencing technology used to assemble the fonio genome

entities.name: BUSCO SCORE
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the completeness of the genome assembly

entities.name: TETRAPLOID
entities.description: The ploidy level of the white fonio genome, containing four sets of chromosomes

entities.name: HOMOEOLOGOUS DUPLICATIONS
entities.description: Genomic duplications retained within the tetraploid genome

entities.name: GYPSY
entities.description: A specific type of long terminal repeat retrotransposon found in the genome

entities.name: COPIA
entities.description: A specific type of long terminal repeat retrotransposon found in the genome

entities.name: LONG TERMINAL REPEAT RETROTRANSPOSONS
entities.description: A class of repeat content in the grass genome

entities.name: SHATTERING
entities.description: A gene-related trait identified for future improvement of white fonio

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A gene-related trait identified for future improvement of white fonio

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: A gene-related trait identified for future improvement of white fonio

entities.name: POPULATION GENETICS
entities.description: The study of genetic variation within and between populations of white fonio

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The primary location where population genetics analysis of white fonio was conducted

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: A grassland domain coinciding with the north-south gradient of genetic diversity

entities.name: SUDAN GRASSLAND DOMAINS
entities.description: A grassland domain coinciding with the north-south gradient of genetic diversity
